definicao:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_pay_receipt(p_correlation_id text)
 RETURNS TABLE(correlation_id text, matricula text, valor numeric, paid_at timestamp with time zone, unit_id uuid, customer_name text, unit_name text, unit_cnpj text)
 LANGUAGE sql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
  SELECT p.correlation_id, p.matricula, p.valor, COALESCE(p.data_pagamento, p.created_at) AS paid_at, p.unit_id, COALESCE(p.name, c.name) AS customer_name, u.name AS unit_name, NULL::TEXT AS unit_cnpj
  FROM public.pagamentos p LEFT JOIN public.clientes_cobranca_dashboard c ON c.matricula = p.matricula LEFT JOIN public.units u ON u.id = p.unit_id
  WHERE p.correlation_id = p_correlation_id AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM public.links_pagamentos_gerados l WHERE l.correlation_id = p.correlation_id AND l.pix_gateway = 'abacate') LIMIT 1;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_phone_pending_debts(p_whatsapp text, p_unit_id uuid)
 RETURNS TABLE(matricula text, name text, valor_inadimplente numeric, regua text, unit_id uuid, has_active_link boolean, link_pagamento text)
 LANGUAGE sql
AS $function$
  SELECT
    ccs.matricula,
    ccs.name,
    ccs.valor_inadimplente,
    ccs.regua,
    ccs.unit_id,
    EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM links_pagamentos_gerados l
      WHERE l.matricula    = ccs.matricula
        AND l.unit_id      = ccs.unit_id
        AND l.cancelado_at IS NULL
        AND (
          (l.expires_at IS NOT NULL AND l.expires_at > NOW())
          OR
          (l.expires_at IS NULL AND l.data_link_gerado > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day')
        )
    ) AS has_active_link,
    (
      SELECT l.link_pagamento FROM links_pagamentos_gerados l
      WHERE l.matricula    = ccs.matricula
        AND l.unit_id      = ccs.unit_id
        AND l.cancelado_at IS NULL
        AND (
          (l.expires_at IS NOT NULL AND l.expires_at > NOW())
          OR
          (l.expires_at IS NULL AND l.data_link_gerado > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day')
        )
      ORDER BY l.created_at DESC
      LIMIT 1
    ) AS link_pagamento
  FROM clientes_cobranca_setembro ccs
  WHERE ccs.whatsapp        = p_whatsapp
    AND ccs.unit_id         = p_unit_id
    AND ccs.pagamento_feito = false
  ORDER BY ccs.valor_inadimplente DESC;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_regua_totals(_start_ts text, _end_ts text)
 RETURNS TABLE(regua_nr numeric, regua_1 numeric, regua_2 numeric, demais_reguas numeric, count_nr bigint, count_1 bigint, count_2 bigint, count_demais bigint)
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
  WITH classified AS (
    SELECT
      valor,
      CASE
        WHEN UPPER(TRIM(regua)) = 'NR' OR regua IS NULL OR TRIM(regua) = '' THEN 'NR'
        WHEN TRIM(regua) = '1' THEN '1'
        WHEN TRIM(regua) = '2' THEN '2'
        ELSE 'demais'
      END AS bucket
    FROM public.pagamentos
    WHERE data_pagamento >= _start_ts::timestamptz
      AND data_pagamento <= _end_ts::timestamptz
      AND reembolso_realizado IS NOT TRUE
  )
  SELECT
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN bucket = 'NR'     THEN valor ELSE 0 END) / 100.0, 0) AS regua_nr,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN bucket = '1'      THEN valor ELSE 0 END) / 100.0, 0) AS regua_1,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN bucket = '2'      THEN valor ELSE 0 END) / 100.0, 0) AS regua_2,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN bucket = 'demais' THEN valor ELSE 0 END) / 100.0, 0) AS demais_reguas,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE bucket = 'NR')     AS count_nr,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE bucket = '1')      AS count_1,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE bucket = '2')      AS count_2,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE bucket = 'demais') AS count_demais
  FROM classified;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_unit_details(unit_code_param text)
 RETURNS TABLE(id uuid, name text, code text, created_at timestamp with time zone, updated_at timestamp with time zone, user_permissions text[])
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 STABLE SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
DECLARE
  current_user_id UUID;
  target_unit_id UUID;
  is_admin BOOLEAN;
BEGIN
  -- Obter o ID do usuário autenticado
  current_user_id := auth.uid();
  
  -- Se não há usuário autenticado, retornar vazio
  IF current_user_id IS NULL THEN
    RETURN;
  END IF;
  
  -- Buscar o ID da unidade pelo código
  SELECT u.id INTO target_unit_id
  FROM public.units u
  WHERE u.code = unit_code_param;
  
  -- Se a unidade não existe, retornar vazio
  IF target_unit_id IS NULL THEN
    RETURN;
  END IF;
  
  -- Verificar se o usuário é admin
  SELECT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM public.user_roles 
    WHERE user_id = current_user_id 
    AND role = 'admin'
  ) INTO is_admin;
  
  -- Se é admin, retornar a unidade com todas as permissões
  IF is_admin THEN
    RETURN QUERY
    SELECT 
      u.id,
      u.name,
      u.code,
      u.created_at,
      u.updated_at,
      ARRAY['admin', 'dashboard', 'pagamentos', 'cobranca_time', 'whatsapp_errado', 'dashboard_vendas', 'vendas']::TEXT[] AS user_permissions
    FROM public.units u
    WHERE u.id = target_unit_id;
  ELSE
    -- Para usuários não-admin, verificar se tem acesso e retornar com permissões
    RETURN QUERY
    SELECT 
      u.id,
      u.name,
      u.code,
      u.created_at,
      u.updated_at,
      ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT uup.permission::TEXT ORDER BY uup.permission::TEXT) AS user_permissions
    FROM public.units u
    INNER JOIN public.user_unit_permissions uup ON uup.unit_id = u.id
    WHERE u.id = target_unit_id
    AND uup.user_id = current_user_id
    AND uup.is_active = TRUE
    GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.code, u.created_at, u.updated_at;
  END IF;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_user_accessible_units()
 RETURNS TABLE(unit_id uuid, unit_name text, unit_code text, permissions text[])
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 STABLE SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
DECLARE
  current_user_id UUID;
  is_admin BOOLEAN;
BEGIN
  -- Obter o ID do usuário autenticado
  current_user_id := auth.uid();
  
  -- Se não há usuário autenticado, retornar vazio
  IF current_user_id IS NULL THEN
    RETURN;
  END IF;
  
  -- Verificar se o usuário é admin
  SELECT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM public.user_roles 
    WHERE user_id = current_user_id 
    AND role = 'admin'
  ) INTO is_admin;
  
  -- Se é admin, retornar todas as unidades com todas as permissões
  IF is_admin THEN
    RETURN QUERY
    SELECT 
      u.id AS unit_id,
      u.name AS unit_name,
      u.code AS unit_code,
      ARRAY['admin', 'dashboard', 'pagamentos', 'cobranca_time', 'whatsapp_errado', 'dashboard_vendas', 'vendas']::TEXT[] AS permissions
    FROM public.units u
    ORDER BY u.name ASC;
  ELSE
    -- Para usuários não-admin, retornar apenas as unidades com permissões ativas
    RETURN QUERY
    SELECT 
      u.id AS unit_id,
      u.name AS unit_name,
      u.code AS unit_code,
      ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT uup.permission::TEXT ORDER BY uup.permission::TEXT) AS permissions
    FROM public.units u
    INNER JOIN public.user_unit_permissions uup ON uup.unit_id = u.id
    WHERE uup.user_id = current_user_id
    AND uup.is_active = TRUE
    GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.code
    ORDER BY u.name ASC;
  END IF;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_users_with_emails()
 RETURNS TABLE(user_id uuid, name text, email text, is_active boolean)
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
  SELECT p.user_id, p.name, u.email, COALESCE(p.is_active, true)
  FROM public.profiles p
  JOIN auth.users u ON u.id = p.user_id
  ORDER BY p.name;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.has_role(_user_id uuid, _role app_role)
 RETURNS boolean
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
  SELECT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM public.user_roles ur
    WHERE ur.user_id = _user_id
      AND ur.role = _role
  );
$function$
